title: matricaria chamomilla subsp. courrantiana
intro: Matricaria chamomilla subsp. courrantiana is a subspecies of the German chamomile plant, known for its delicate white flowers and apple-like fragrance. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its calming and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of apigenin and luteolin. The health benefits of Matricaria chamomilla subsp. courrantiana include reducing anxiety and insomnia, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps. This plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried flowers for use in various herbal remedies.
